title: Create and save a markdown note (unit)
purpose: Prove the local persistence and lossless-markdown paths in isolation, without a browser or a real IndexedDB, using the in-memory shim.

testCases.description: Saving a new note assigns an id and the note is readable back with the same body.
testCases.testPointer: test/notes/note-repository.test.js::saves a new note and reads it back

testCases.description: Saving an empty editor creates no note and surfaces a validation message.
Headings, lists, fenced code blocks, and wiki-links survive a serialize/parse round trip byte-for-byte.
